description: Health Gorilla provides healthcare interoperability infrastructure for accessing and exchanging clinical data, including patient record retrieval, alerts, referrals, and lab workflows. Its platform is built around FHIR-based APIs and network connectivity for healthcare organizations.
summary: Health Gorilla exposes a public developer portal for one protected HTTP integration surface: OAuth 2.0-authenticated FHIR-based REST APIs at https://api.healthgorilla.com, covering FHIR R4 and legacy STU3 workflows; no public GraphQL, MCP server, CLI, or downloadable OpenAPI spec URL was found.
